description: A photograph showing a sandy beach in a cove, identified as being at the Doñana Natura 2000 (N2K) site in Southern Spain. The beach features light-coloured sand and is situated between steep, arid hills covered with sparse, low-density vegetation. The water in the cove is clear and turquoise. Multiple individuals are visible on the beach. Buildings are discernible on the distant hills overlooking the cove. The image is credited to M. Palacios and serves as an example for defining the "Sandy beach" land cover class.
